name: @types/fs-extra
usage_summary: The underlying 'fs-extra' package is used in three source files across two packages. cli-kit/src/public/node/fs.ts imports from 'fs-extra/esm' (subpath import). features/steps/create-app.steps.ts and features/steps/app.steps.ts both import 'fs from "fs-extra"' as a default import. The installed fs-extra (v11.1.0) ships no bundled TypeScript declarations (no 'types' or 'typings' field in package.json), so @types/fs-extra is required for type-safe usage in all three files.
how_to_remove: Cannot remove — @types/fs-extra is actively needed because fs-extra@11.x ships no bundled types. Removal would break type-checking in cli-kit/src/public/node/fs.ts and two files in features. Possible long-term strategy: cli-kit already wraps fs-extra functions in its own public API (node/fs.ts), so fs-extra could be replaced by native Node.js fs/promises for those wrapped functions, eventually eliminating the fs-extra dependency entirely. The features package uses fs-extra directly for convenience; replacing with node:fs/promises is trivial per file but requires auditing all usage.
replacement_reason: fs-extra@11.x ships no bundled types and is actively used across two packages. Removal of @types/fs-extra would require first eliminating or replacing the fs-extra dependency itself.
